LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MIRA COLUCCIO'S NOTICE OF HEARING IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 30, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION, TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 16, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-30-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
REPLY TO RESPONDENTS PRELIMINARY ANSWER (TRANSACTION ID # 15266003) FILED BY PETITIONER COLUCCIO, MIRA
STATEMENT OF DECISION FILED BY PETITIONER COLUCCIO, MIRA

NOTICE OF LODGING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD (TRANSACTION ID # 15237059) FILED BY PETITIONER COLUCCIO, MIRA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MIRA COLUCCIO'S NOTICE OF HEARING - THE PETITION IS GRANTED AND THE LICENSE SUSPENSION IS VACATED. PETITIONER PERSUASIVELY DEMONSTRATES THAT THE LICENSE SUSPENSION WAS BASED ON AN ERRONEOUS LABORATORY REPORT. RESPONDENT HAS NOT FILED ANY FORMAL OPPOSITION TO THIS PETITION. MR. CAMPBELL TO PREPARE A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION WITHIN 5 DAYS AND THE RESPONDENT GIVEN ANOTHER 5 DAYS TO RESPOND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE SUSPENSION OF PETITIONER'S DRIVING PRIVILEGE SHALL BE VACATED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES FARRAGHER CAMPBELL OF CAMPBELL & DeMETRICK LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-766-3542 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. ROBERT ANDREW HARKNESS, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL'S OFFICE, TEL. NO. 1-510-622-2216 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MIRA COLUCCIO's Notice Of Hearing - The petition is granted and the license suspension is vacated. Petitioner persuasively demonstrates that the license suspension was based on an erroneous laboratory report. Respondent has not filed any formal opposition to this petition. Mr. Campbell to prepare a Proposed Statement of Decision within 5 days and the respondent given another 5 days to respond. Order signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MIRA COLUCCIO'S Notice Of Hearing is continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposing papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 16, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
